assignee.description: Optional assignee/queue hint (assignment-as-Decision is Phase 3.3; here it is a passthrough label).

slaMs.description: SLA in milliseconds; when it elapses before a resolution signal, the task escalates.

out.description: Blackboard variable the resolution (or `onTimeout`) value is written to.

onTimeout.description: Value written to `out` when the SLA fires before a resolution signal (the escalation path).

description:
A `human-task` step — raise a Task and block until resolved (doc 04 §5.2). Modelled as a `createTask`
activity plus an **await-signal raced by an SLA timer**: a resolution signal writes its value to `out`;
if the SLA fires first the task **escalates** and `onTimeout` is written instead. Time-skip makes a
month-long SLA verify in milliseconds.
